def positive_in_check_on_list_literal():
    rule_id = "in_check_on_list_literal"
    family = "hot_path"
    severity = "info"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Membership tests against list literals where a tuple or set would be clearer or cheaper."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
